description: A repository cleanup is required. We currently have a 'Generic' repository named 'temp-uploads' containing Maven artifacts that were uploaded manually. These need to be moved to a proper Maven repository to be usable by build tools. Create a new Maven Local Repository with the key 'libs-commons-local'. Move all artifacts (specifically the 'org' folder and its contents) from 'temp-uploads' to 'libs-commons-local', then delete the 'temp-uploads' repository. Log in to Artifactory at http://localhost:8082 with default admin credentials (admin / password).
